metadata.desc:
Remote manager for StarRailAssistant (SRA). Run tasks, check status and view logs via /sra commands.
   ⭐Plugin Group:1098236107   ⭐SRA Group:994571792

sra_host.hint: Address of SRA Frontend Server, default localhost

sra_port.hint: Port of SRA Frontend Server, default 5000

enable_whitelist.hint: When enabled, only whitelisted users can use /sra commands

whitelist_users.hint: Add users allowed to use /sra commands. If empty and whitelist is enabled, no one can use it.

account_id.hint: Enter the account from /sid UMO (e.g. 3786293235) or group ID
